content:
The user wants me to extract the table of contents from the provided image and format it as JSON. 1. **Identify the image content**: The image is a table of contents page from a technical datasheet, specifically for STM32F411xC and STM32F411xE microcontrollers. 2. **Locate the main title**: The main title "Contents" is at the top. 3. **Locate the table**: The main body of the page is a table listing sections and subsections with their corresponding page numbers. 4. **Extract the data**: I need to go through each row of the table and extract the section number, title, and page number. * **1 Introduction**: 11 * **2 Description**: 12 * **2.1 Compatibility with STM32F4 series**: 14 * **3 Functional overview**: 17 * **3.1 Arm® Cortex®-M4 with FPU core with embedded flash memory and SRAM**: 17 * **3.2 Adaptive real-time memory accelerator (ART Accelerator)**: 17 * **3.3 Batch acquisition mode (BAM)**: 17 * **3.4 Memory protection unit**: 18 * **3.5 Embedded flash memory**: 18 * **3.6 CRC (cyclic redundancy check) calculation unit**: 18 * **3.7 Embedded SRAM**: 18 * **3.8 Multi-AHB bus matrix**: 19 * **3.9 DMA controller (DMA)**: 19 * **3.10 Nested vectored interrupt controller (NVIC)**: 20 * **3.11 External interrupt/event controller (EXTI)**: 20 * **3.12 Clocks and startup**: 20 * **3.13 Boot modes**: 21 * **3.14 Power supply schemes**: 21 * **3.15 Power supply supervisor**: 22 * **3.15.1 Internal reset ON**: 22 * **3.15.2 Internal reset OFF**: 22 * **3.16 Voltage regulator**: 23 * **3.16.1 Regulator ON**: 23 * **3.16.2 Regulator OFF**: 23 * **3.16.3 Regulator ON/OFF and internal power supply supervisor availability**: 26 * **3.17 Real-time clock (RTC) and backup registers**: 26 * **3.18 Low-power modes**: 27 * **3.19 VBAT operation**: 27 * **3.20 Timers and watchdogs**: 28 5. **Format the output**: Create a JSON list of objects, where each object represents a row in the table of contents. 6. **Verify**: Check for any missed entries or formatting errors. The extracted data looks complete and accurate based on the image. 7. **Final JSON construction**: Assemble the extracted data into the final JSON format. ```json [{"bbox": [109, 68, 347, 83], "category": "header", "text": "STM32F411xC STM32F411xE"}, {"bbox": [810, 68, 889, 83], "category": "header", "text": "Contents"}, {"bbox": [109, 105, 238, 126], "category": "title", "text": "Contents"}, {"bbox": [106, 156, 891, 844], "category": "table", "text": "

"}, {"bbox": [117, 873, 169, 894], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [443, 882, 555, 895], "category": "footer", "text": "DS10314 Rev 8"}, {"bbox": [845, 882, 889, 895], "category": "footer", "text": "3/151"}] ```
